title: Sable & Finch Realty listing tour: branded 16:9 master property walkthrough with 9:16 reel + 1:1 square cutdowns, licensed music bed, cleaned agent narration, color-match grade reference, YouTube thumbnail, and on-brand lower-third / end-card graphic plates

source.reference: Real Estate Listing / Property Tour Video Editor

grounding_note: GROUNDED in the real Upwork brief 'Real Estate Listing / Property Tour Video Editor': a realtor supplies raw handheld property-walkthrough clips plus a few exterior shots and wants them turned into a polished, branded listing tour video (trim and sequence the best shots into a sizzle, add branded lower-thirds with the address / price / agent, an intro title and an end card, a licensed music bed, and a consistent color grade) exported for MLS/website plus vertical social and a YouTube thumbnail. REASONABLY ENRICHED into a runnable Adobe-connector benchmark with a FICTIONAL, IP-clean brand (Sable & Finch Realty; agent Priya Nadeau; listing 12 Heronwood Lane, Halcyon Bay) and concrete inputs (four raw ungraded clips, a flat logo PNG, a warm brand look-reference still, a noisy scratch narration WAV, a shot-list CSV, and a listing-copy CSV). Every step is tagged honestly for execution mode. The 16:9 MASTER is a deterministic timeline assembly via video_render (sequence/trim the chosen shots on a video track, licensed music bed under it on an audio track). The social sizzle is an AI visual-engagement cut via video_create_quick_cut, reframed to 9:16 and 1:1 with video_resize (same length, no trimming). Because NO Adobe connector tool grades video frames or composites text/graphics onto video, the brief's 'color grade' and 'branded lower-thirds / intro / end card' are honestly re-scoped: a representative interior frame is grabbed (video_render_frame) and graded into a color-match GRADE REFERENCE the editor matches every clip to in their NLE, and the branded overlays are delivered as standalone graphic PLATES (opaque solid-fill lower-third bar and end-card panel = exact brand color + position references), a vectorized logo SVG, a color-overlay end-card variant, plus a resolved Adobe Fonts type spec and the exact lower-third copy as data — the editor rebuilds/composites the text onto the timeline. No generative fill, no text-to-image or from-scratch art, no upscaling, no object removal, no video-trim-to-timestamp, no compositing onto video; image_fill_area is solid-color only; video_resize is same-length reframe.
one_line_ask: Turn Sable & Finch Realty's four raw handheld property-walkthrough / exterior clips, flat logo, warm brand look-reference, scratch agent narration, shot list, and listing copy into a branded listing tour package: a polished ~90s 16:9 master (sequenced best shots with a licensed music bed under a cleaned narration), a 9:16 reel and 1:1 square social cutdown, a graded color-match reference the editor matches every clip to, a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail, a vector logo plus on-brand lower-third and end-card graphic plates and type spec, all packaged onto a Firefly board and into a dated CC handoff folder.
full_brief:
Sable & Finch Realty is a boutique residential brokerage (tagline 'Homes with a story.'), and agent Priya Nadeau needs a polished listing tour for a new exclusive: 12 Heronwood Lane, Halcyon Bay - a 4 bed / 3 bath, ~3,200 sq ft modern coastal farmhouse listed at $1,275,000. She shot the walkthrough herself on a phone and a small drone and needs an editor to turn the raw footage into a professional, on-brand tour for the MLS/website plus social, delivered to spec.

Source material supplied: (1) four raw, ungraded clips - a handheld entry + open-plan living-room walkthrough, a chef's-kitchen glide, a primary-suite + ensuite pass, and an exterior clip covering the front elevation and backyard; (2) the Sable & Finch logo as a flat PNG; (3) a warm, editorial brand look-reference still representing the golden-hour, airy, deep-green look the whole piece should be graded toward; (4) a scratch voiceover WAV Priya recorded on her phone in the empty house (roomy, HVAC hum, some street noise) that needs cleaning before it can carry the tour; (5) a shot-list CSV noting the best moments and the room order she wants; and (6) a listing-copy CSV with the exact lower-third / card text (address, price, beds/baths/sqft, her name, phone, DRE license, CTA, tagline) and the brand hex codes (evergreen #1F3A34, brushed brass #C7A66B, warm cream #F5F0E6).

Deliverables, mapped to Adobe Creative Cloud connector tools with every step honestly tagged for execution mode:

A. AUDIO - clean the scratch narration so it can sit under the tour (voice-only denoise / de-room, not music mastering); and license a fitting instrumental music bed from Adobe Stock for the master.

B. VIDEO - (1) read each clip's technical metadata and summarize the footage so we agree the shot order and flow before cutting; (2) primary deliverable: assemble a polished ~90-second 16:9 MASTER by sequencing and trimming the best shots onto a timeline with the licensed music bed under them (1920x1080 H.264); (3) produce a punchy social sizzle as an AI best-moment cut, and reframe it to a 9:16 reel and a 1:1 square social cutdown (same length, no trimming).

C. COLOR MATCH - the raw clips are flat and mixed-white-balance; because the automated connector pass does not grade video frames directly, grab a representative interior frame and grade it (auto-tone, warm toward the brand look-reference, recover the blown window highlights, shape vibrance, crop clean to 1920x1080) into a COLOR-MATCH GRADE REFERENCE the editor matches every clip to in the NLE.

D. BRAND GRAPHICS (standalone plates / references, NOT composited onto the video by the connector) - vectorize the logo to a clean SVG; recommend and resolve the brand's Adobe Fonts for the lower-thirds and cards; build an opaque lower-third bar plate (brand-evergreen solid-fill swatch/position reference for the address/price/agent bar) and an opaque end-card panel plate (cream/brass), plus a subtle brand-overlay end-card variant for the social close. The exact address/price/agent copy ships as data + the type spec so the editor rebuilds the text on the timeline.

E. THUMBNAIL - grab the exterior hero frame and grade it into a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail with negative space for the title lockup.

F. PACKAGING - gather the master, reel, square, thumbnail, grade reference, logo SVG, both plates, end-card variant, cleaned narration, and licensed music bed onto a Firefly board, and copy every final into a dated Creative Cloud handoff folder so the whole editable-asset set stays with the project. Two rounds of feedback should be plenty.

inputs.name: raw_walkthrough_entry_living.mp4
inputs.gen_prompt: Raw handheld 16:9 phone footage, 1920x1080, ~18 seconds, a real-estate walkthrough entering a modern coastal farmhouse: push through the front door into a bright open-plan living room with white shiplap walls, vaulted ceiling with exposed beams, a large sectional, and floor-to-ceiling windows blowing out to daylight. Slow handheld glide forward with natural micro-shake, mixed white balance (cool daylight from the windows vs warm interior lamps), flat ungraded picture profile, slightly overexposed windows, real lens vignetting, candid documentary look, native ambient room audio and faint footsteps, no captions, no logo, no text overlays, not glossy CGI.
inputs.realism_notes: Must look like genuine amateur agent phone footage: handheld wobble, flat/log-ish ungraded contrast, and blown-out windows so the highlight-recovery + color-match grade chain (auto-tone -> temperature -> highlights -> vibrance) has real work. Mixed WB (cool windows vs warm lamps) gives the grade a genuine target toward the warm brand look-reference. Native ambient audio present.

inputs.name: raw_walkthrough_kitchen.mp4
inputs.gen_prompt: Raw handheld 16:9 phone footage, 1920x1080, ~15 seconds, a chef's kitchen in a modern farmhouse: a slow handheld pan across a large marble waterfall island, brass pendant lights, white shaker cabinetry, a pro range, and a window over the sink. Natural micro-shake, flat ungraded profile, mixed daylight-plus-tungsten white balance, mild motion blur, candid, real reflections on the countertop, native ambient audio, no captions, no logo, no text overlays.
inputs.realism_notes: Second interior walkthrough shot; deliberately flat and mixed-WB so it needs the same grade the color-match reference locks. Brass pendants and warm wood give the vibrance step something on-brand to lift. Handheld, not a gimbal render.

inputs.name: raw_walkthrough_primary_suite.mp4
inputs.gen_prompt: Raw handheld 16:9 phone footage, 1920x1080, ~14 seconds, a primary bedroom suite in a coastal farmhouse: reveal a king bed with linen bedding, then continue into a spa-style ensuite with a freestanding tub, double vanity, and a window with soft sheer curtains. Slow handheld drift, natural shake, flat ungraded contrast, cool morning daylight mixed with warm sconces, candid documentary framing, native ambient audio, no captions, no logo, no text overlays.
inputs.realism_notes: Third interior clip so the shot flow (living -> kitchen -> primary suite) is a real sequencing decision for video_render / the shot list. Flat and mixed-WB to match the other clips' grade target. Handheld realism, not cinematic CGI.

inputs.name: raw_exterior_frontage_yard.mp4
inputs.gen_prompt: Raw 16:9 footage, 1920x1080, ~16 seconds, exterior of a modern coastal farmhouse at golden hour: a slow low drone push-in on the front elevation (board-and-batten siding, black-framed windows, a covered porch, mature landscaping and a paved driveway), then a brief handheld move around to the backyard showing a lawn, a patio, and a plunge pool. Warm low-angle sun, some lens flare, flat ungraded picture profile, slightly crooked handheld horizon on the backyard portion, native ambient audio with light wind, no captions, no logo, no text overlays.
inputs.realism_notes: The 'few exterior shots' the brief asks for, in one clip (front elevation + backyard). Golden-hour hero frame is grabbed for the YouTube thumbnail; the slightly crooked handheld horizon gives image_auto_straighten real work, and the bright sky gives highlight recovery real work. Ungraded so it matches the same color-match reference.

inputs.name: sablefinch_logo.png
inputs.gen_prompt: A flat, clean vector-style real-estate brokerage logo on a transparent background: a small stylized line-art finch-on-a-branch mark above the two-line wordmark 'SABLE & FINCH' / 'REALTY' in an elegant high-contrast serif, single brand color deep evergreen (#1F3A34) with a thin brushed-brass (#C7A66B) rule between the lines. Crisp clean edges, solid fills, no gradients, no photographic texture, centered, 2400x1400 PNG with alpha - suitable for vectorizing.
inputs.realism_notes: Flat solid-color, crisp-edged, text-bearing brand art with transparent alpha so image_vectorize produces a clean scalable SVG for the end card and corner bug. Text/logo asset => gemini-3-pro-image.

inputs.name: brand_look_reference.jpg
inputs.gen_prompt: A warm, editorial real-estate interior look-reference photograph representing a premium brand grade: a sunlit modern-farmhouse living room at golden hour, airy warm whites, honeyed wood floors, deep-green accents, soft natural contrast, gentle warm highlights and clean shadows, subtle film-like grain. Photoreal, inviting, magazine-quality color. No text, no logo.
inputs.realism_notes: Provides a believable warm/golden target the color-temperature + vibrance grade steps aim the interior frame toward; photoreal => gpt-image-2. Used only as a grade match reference, not a deliverable.

inputs.name: agent_narration_scratch.wav
inputs.gen_prompt: A warm, confident female realtor recording ~40 seconds of scratch narration for a listing tour: 'Welcome to 12 Heronwood Lane - a light-filled coastal farmhouse where every room tells a story. Four bedrooms, three baths, a chef's kitchen, and a backyard built for golden-hour evenings. This one won't last - let's find your next chapter.' Capture as WAV, then deliberately degrade for an audio-repair task: add empty-room reverb, a low HVAC hum, and faint street traffic so it sounds recorded on a phone in an empty house.
inputs.realism_notes: Intentionally roomy/noisy (NOT a clean studio take) because it is the input to media_enhance_speech - the voice-only repair must have real reverb and background hum to remove. Single voice, no music bed.

inputs.name: shot_list.csv
inputs.gen_prompt: CSV with columns order,clip,room,shot_type,best_moment_seconds,priority,notes capturing the agent's preferred sequence for a ~90s tour, e.g. 1,raw_exterior_frontage_yard.mp4,exterior,drone push-in,0-4,1,'open on the golden-hour front elevation'; 2,raw_walkthrough_entry_living.mp4,living,reveal,2-9,1,'hero vaulted living room'; 3,raw_walkthrough_kitchen.mp4,kitchen,island glide,1-8,2,'marble island + brass pendants'; 4,raw_walkthrough_primary_suite.mp4,primary,reveal+ensuite,3-12,2,'bed reveal then tub'; 5,raw_exterior_frontage_yard.mp4,backyard,handheld,10-16,1,'close on pool + patio'. 6-8 rows, ordered.
inputs.realism_notes: Reads like the agent's real shot list; passed as free-text steering into media_summarize and as the human-decided sequence guiding the video_render master timeline and the quick_cut prompt - NOT machine-executed frame-accurate cut instructions.

inputs.name: listing_copy.csv
inputs.gen_prompt: CSV with columns field,value holding the exact on-screen copy and brand kit for the lower-thirds and cards: address,'12 Heronwood Lane, Halcyon Bay, CA'; price,'$1,275,000'; specs,'4 Bed | 3 Bath | 3,200 sq ft'; agent,'Priya Nadeau'; phone,'(805) 555-0148'; license,'DRE #02114387'; brokerage,'Sable & Finch Realty'; tagline,'Homes with a story.'; cta,'Book a private tour'; color_evergreen,'#1F3A34'; color_brass,'#C7A66B'; color_cream,'#F5F0E6'. 10-12 rows.
inputs.realism_notes: The exact lower-third / intro / end-card text plus brand hex codes the editor composites onto the timeline over the graphic plates; delivered as a data asset because the connector does not composite text onto video or photos. Drives the fill color of the solid-fill plates.

outputs.name: listing_tour_master_16x9.mp4
outputs.spec: Primary deliverable: polished ~90s 16:9 listing tour MASTER, 1920x1080 H.264, assembled by video_render from a timeline that sequences and trims the best shots of the four raw clips (per the shot list / footage summary) on a video track, with the licensed Adobe Stock music bed under them on an audio track at reduced gain. [A] async render. Frame-accurate cross-dissolves, motion graphics, and burned-in text are the flagged manual NLE finish - the automated pass delivers the sequenced/scored master; the editor lays the graphic plates and copy on top and matches the color grade to the grade reference.

outputs.name: listing_reel_9x16.mp4
outputs.spec: Vertical social reel, 1080x1920 (9:16), ~30s, produced by reframing the AI best-moment sizzle (video_create_quick_cut) with video_resize - SAME length, no trimming. [A] async. For Instagram Reels / TikTok / YouTube Shorts.

outputs.name: listing_square_1x1.mp4
outputs.spec: Square social cutdown, 1080x1080 (1:1), ~30s, produced by reframing the same sizzle with video_resize (same length, no trimming). [A] async. For Instagram / Facebook feed.

outputs.name: color_match_look_reference.jpg
outputs.spec: Graded 1920x1080 interior GRADE REFERENCE frame: a representative interior frame grabbed from the footage (video_render_frame), then auto-toned, warmed toward the brand look-reference, window highlights recovered, vibrance shaped, and cropped clean to 1920x1080. This is the locked look the editor matches every video clip's grade to in the NLE (the honest re-scope of 'color-match the clips', since the connector does not grade video frames directly). [C] headless raster chain.

outputs.name: youtube_thumbnail_1280x720.png
outputs.spec: YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720 PNG: the golden-hour exterior hero frame grabbed from the exterior clip (video_render_frame), then auto-straightened, auto-toned, sky highlights recovered, vibrance lifted, and cropped/resized to exactly 1280x720 with negative space reserved for the title lockup. The title text lockup is the flagged human-finish placement. [C] headless raster chain.

outputs.name: sablefinch_logo.svg
outputs.spec: Clean vectorized SVG of the flat Sable & Finch logo (image_vectorize) for scalable end-card and corner-bug use. [C].

outputs.name: lower_third_bar_plate.png
outputs.spec: Opaque lower-third bar plate, 1920x1080 PNG: a horizontal lower-third region of the graded reference canvas selected (image_select_by_prompt) and solid-filled with brand evergreen #1F3A34 (image_fill_area) to give the editor an exact on-brand color + position reference for the address/price/agent bar to drop on the timeline. Solid-color fill only, no text composited; NOT a transparent cutout (headless selection-fill paints a region on the existing opaque canvas). [C].

outputs.name: end_card_panel_plate.png
outputs.spec: Opaque end-card panel plate, 1920x1080 PNG: a centered panel region of the same plate canvas selected and solid-filled with warm cream #F5F0E6 (image_fill_area) as the on-brand end-card background swatch/position reference for the logo + agent-contact lockup. Solid-color fill only; NOT a transparent cutout. [C].

outputs.name: social_endcard_variant.jpg
outputs.spec: On-brand end-card variant, 1920x1080: the graded reference frame with a subtle evergreen/brass brand color overlay (image_apply_color_overlay) for the social reel close. [C].

outputs.name: cleaned_agent_narration.wav
outputs.spec: Denoised / de-reverbed agent narration, voice-only (media_enhance_speech), suitable to sit under the master tour during the NLE finish. [A] async, voice-only (not music/loudness mastering).

outputs.name: licensed_music_bed
outputs.spec: A licensed Adobe Stock instrumental music bed (warm, uplifting real-estate/cinematic) - found via asset_search and licensed + downloaded via asset_license_and_download_stock (full-resolution presigned download URL). Placed under the master on the video_render audio track. [C].

outputs.name: brand_type_spec
outputs.spec: Brand type spec: the recommended lower-third / card typefaces (font_recommend) resolved against the Adobe Fonts library into confirmed families + PostScript names (find_fonts) so the editor sets the on-screen text in the correct brand fonts. Delivered as a small data spec. [C].

outputs.name: listing_tour_handoff_board
outputs.spec: Firefly board deep-link gathering the master, reel, square, grade reference, thumbnail, logo SVG, both plates, end-card variant, cleaned narration, and licensed music bed as one organized editable-asset set for the NLE handoff. [C].

outputs.name: listing_tour_package_folder
outputs.spec: A dated Creative Cloud handoff folder (asset_copy_assets) holding every final deliverable + the type spec so source and deliverables sit together for the two feedback rounds. [C].

connector_workflow.note: Create a managed Creative Cloud project folder ('SableFinch_12Heronwood_ListingTour') to hold every source and produced asset. Root of the deliverable package.
Initialize a block upload of all client-supplied sources (four raw clips, logo PNG, brand look-reference, scratch narration WAV, shot-list CSV, listing-copy CSV) into project_folder.
Finalize the multipart uploads; returns stored CC asset handles for every source file - the chain's root inputs now live in the project folder.
Read width/height/fps/duration for each of the four ingested clips so the master timeline uses correct source durations and framerate. Metadata is returned directly (headless-retrievable) => [C].

Summarize the four walkthrough/exterior clips (content + flow), steered by the shot-list CSV, so we agree the room order and the best moments before cutting. Consumes the ingested video assets. [A] async-widget.
Voice-only denoise / de-room of the scratch narration WAV (remove empty-room reverb, HVAC hum, street noise) so it can sit under the tour. Consumes the ingested narration. [A] async-widget.
Search Adobe Stock for a warm, uplifting instrumental real-estate/cinematic music bed for the master. Returns candidate Stock asset IDs. [C].
License the chosen Stock music track from step 7 and obtain a full-resolution download URL. Consumes the selected candidate. Produces the licensed music bed placed under the master. [C].

AI visual-engagement best-moment cut across the four ingested clips into a punchy ~30s social sizzle, prompted by the agreed flow (step 5) + shot list for warm, inviting listing energy. Not a timestamp trim. [A] async-widget.

Assemble the ~90s 16:9 MASTER via a video_render timeline document: a video track that sequences and trims the best shots of the four clips (order + in/out points from the shot list / summary + clip_specs), and an audio track carrying the licensed music bed at reduced gain. 1920x1080. Deterministic edit (not AI selection, not a timestamp-only trim of a single clip). [A] async render.
Reframe the step-9 sizzle to 1080x1920 (9:16) for vertical social - SAME length, no trimming. [A] async-widget.
Reframe the same step-9 sizzle to 1080x1080 (1:1) for feed placements - SAME length, no trimming. [A] async-widget.

Grab a representative interior frame (the hero vaulted living-room moment) from the ingested entry/living clip at a chosen timecode as a JPEG for the color-match grade reference. Frame is returned directly (headless-retrievable) => [C].
Grab the golden-hour exterior hero frame from the ingested exterior clip at a chosen timecode as a JPEG for the YouTube thumbnail. Returned directly => [C].
Initialize a block upload to store the two extracted JPEG frames (steps 13-14) back into the project folder as CC assets so the raster chain can consume them by URL.
Finalize the frame uploads into real CC asset URLs (interior_look_frame + exterior_hero_frame).
Lay down an auto-tone baseline on the interior frame - first link of the color-match grade chain. Consumes the ingested interior frame. [C].
Warm the interior white balance toward the golden, airy brand look, matching the ingested brand_look_reference. Consumes step-17 + the look-reference. [C].
Pull down the blown-out window highlights (real-estate HDR balance) to recover exterior detail. Consumes step-18. [C].
Shape vibrance/saturation so the wood tones and deep-green accents read on-brand without oversaturating skin/walls. Consumes step-19. [C].
Crop/resize the graded interior frame clean to 1920x1080 -> the color-match GRADE REFERENCE the editor matches every clip to. Consumes step-20 (downscale/crop only, no canvas extension). [C].
Level the slightly crooked handheld horizon on the exterior hero frame - first link of the thumbnail chain. Consumes the ingested exterior frame. [C].
Auto-tone baseline on the straightened exterior frame. Consumes step-22. [C].
Recover the bright golden-hour sky highlights so the front elevation is well-exposed. Consumes step-23. [C].
Lift vibrance so the frontage, landscaping, and warm light read inviting for a click-worthy thumbnail. Consumes step-24. [C].
Crop/resize the graded exterior frame to exactly 1280x720 with negative space reserved for the title lockup -> YouTube thumbnail. Consumes step-25 (crop/downscale only). [C].
Vectorize the flat Sable & Finch logo PNG into a clean scalable SVG for the end card and corner bug. Consumes the ingested logo. [C].

Recommend on-brand typefaces for the listing lower-thirds / intro / end card (an elegant high-contrast serif for the brokerage + a clean sans for the address/price/specs), matching the boutique real-estate brand mood. [C].
Confirm the recommended fonts (step 28) are available in the Adobe Fonts library and resolve them to exact PostScript names -> the brand type spec the editor sets the on-screen copy in. [C].
On a copy of the graded reference reused as the (opaque) plate canvas, select a lower-third horizontal bar region for the address/price/agent overlay. Consumes step-21. [C].

Solid-fill the selected region with brand evergreen #1F3A34 to produce the opaque 1920x1080 lower-third bar plate - an exact color + position reference (solid-color fill only, no text composited; NOT a transparent cutout). Consumes step-30. [C].
On the same plate canvas, select a centered panel region for the end-card logo + agent-contact lockup. Consumes step-31. [C].
Solid-fill the panel region with warm cream #F5F0E6 to produce the opaque end-card panel plate (solid-color fill only; NOT a transparent cutout). Consumes step-32. [C].
Apply a subtle evergreen/brass brand color overlay to the graded reference frame to produce the on-brand social-reel end-card variant. Consumes step-21. [C].

connector_workflow.inputs_from: listing_tour_master_16x9.mp4, listing_reel_9x16.mp4, listing_square_1x1.mp4, color_match_look_reference.jpg, youtube_thumbnail_1280x720.png, sablefinch_logo.svg, lower_third_bar_plate.png, end_card_panel_plate.png, social_endcard_variant.jpg, cleaned_agent_narration.wav, licensed_music_bed
connector_workflow.note: Gather every produced deliverable (master, reel, square, grade reference, thumbnail, logo SVG, both plates, end-card variant, cleaned narration, licensed music bed) into one Firefly board deep-link as the organized editable-asset handoff for the NLE project. [C].

connector_workflow.inputs_from: listing_tour_master_16x9.mp4, listing_reel_9x16.mp4, listing_square_1x1.mp4, color_match_look_reference.jpg, youtube_thumbnail_1280x720.png, sablefinch_logo.svg, lower_third_bar_plate.png, end_card_panel_plate.png, social_endcard_variant.jpg, cleaned_agent_narration.wav, licensed_music_bed, brand_type_spec
connector_workflow.note: Copy all final deliverables + the brand type spec into a single dated handoff folder in the client's Creative Cloud so source + deliverables sit together for the two feedback rounds. [C].

chaining_note: One long output->input chain rooted on the client-supplied assets, fanning into audio / video / stills sub-chains that converge on a single handoff. Steps 1-3 stand up the project (create folder -> init upload -> finalize) yielding ingested_assets. video_metadata(4) reads the four clips' specs to plan the master. (AUDIO) media_enhance_speech(6) cleans the ingested narration; asset_search(7) -> asset_license_and_download_stock(8) licenses the music bed. (VIDEO) media_summarize(5) turns the ingested clips + shot list into tour_flow_summary, which steers video_create_quick_cut(9) into the sizzle and, with clip_specs(4) + the licensed music bed(8), feeds video_render(10) to assemble the 16:9 master timeline; video_resize(11) and video_resize(12) each consume the step-9 sizzle to produce the 9:16 reel and 1:1 square (same length). (STILLS) video_render_frame(13) and (14) grab an interior and an exterior frame; those two JPEGs are uploaded(15)/finalized(16) into ingested_frames. The interior frame threads a 5-link color-match grade - auto_tone(17)->color_temperature(18, also reading the ingested brand look-reference)->highlights(19)->vibrance(20)->crop_and_resize(21)=color_match_look_reference; the exterior frame threads its own thumbnail grade - auto_straighten(22)->auto_tone(23)->highlights(24)->vibrance(25)->crop_and_resize(26)=youtube_thumbnail. image_vectorize(27) consumes the ingested logo -> logo SVG; font_recommend(28)->find_fonts(29) resolve the brand type spec. The plates reuse the graded reference as canvas: select_by_prompt(30)->fill_area(31)=lower-third bar, whose output feeds select_by_prompt(32)->fill_area(33)=end-card panel; apply_color_overlay(34) consumes the graded reference -> social end-card variant. Finally create_firefly_board(35) and asset_copy_assets(36) consume the produced deliverables. Nothing after step 3 starts from scratch; every post-ingest step reads a prior step's named output (or the finalized ingest set / ingested_frames for a legitimate sub-chain root).
difficulty_rationale: Long-horizon flagship: 36 connector calls, 26 distinct Adobe tools, spanning four connector groups (asset/storage/board [C], video/audio [A], photo/raster grade [C], vector + solid-fill plates + type resolution [C]) with parallel audio/video/stills sub-chains converging on one NLE-handoff package - far past the >=20 calls / >=9 distinct-tool bar. Difficulty comes from (a) honoring the [A] async vs [C] headless split correctly: the full-media video/audio deliverables (cleaned narration, AI sizzle, rendered 16:9 master, 9:16 + 1:1 reframes) are async product actions, while the durable creative spine (metadata read, two 5-link raster grades, logo SVG, two selection->solid-fill plates, color-overlay variant, type resolution, board, folder) is fully headless-confirmed - and video_metadata / video_render_frame are correctly tagged [C] because they return values/frames directly; (b) respecting the hard limits while still satisfying the brief's 'color grade + branded lower-thirds / intro / end card' intent: the connector does NOT grade video frames or composite text/graphics onto video, so the grade ships as a color-match REFERENCE the editor matches every clip to, and the branded overlays ship as standalone graphic PLATES + a resolved type spec + the exact copy as data; the 16:9 master is a deterministic video_render timeline assembly (real trim/sequence of the best shots with a music bed on an audio track), the sizzle is a distinct video_create_quick_cut visual-engagement pass (NOT a timestamp trim), and video_resize is same-length reframe only; image_fill_area is solid-color only, image_crop_and_resize only crops/downscales (no canvas extension), and there is no generative fill, text-to-image / from-scratch art, upscaling, or object removal; (c) keeping every post-ingest step strictly output->input chained into one coherent editable-asset package a real listing-tour freelancer would bill several hours for.

reverify.banned_capability_check: Confirmed NONE of the banned capabilities are used. No generative fill / generative-expand / outpaint / canvas extension - image_crop_and_resize (steps 21, 26) only crops/downscales existing frames to 1920x1080 and 1280x720. No upscaling / super-resolution. No text-to-image or from-scratch art/logo/motion-graphics design - the logo is client-supplied and only traced by image_vectorize; font_recommend/find_fonts only recommend and resolve EXISTING Adobe Fonts (no bespoke letterform design). No object removal / inpainting. image_fill_area (steps 31, 33) is solid-color fill painting a region onto the existing OPAQUE reference canvas - the lower-third bar and end-card panel are opaque color+position PLATES, NOT transparent cutouts (headless selection-fill cannot emit alpha, so plates are honestly specified as opaque PNG frames). No text or graphics are composited onto video or onto photos: the branded lower-third / intro / end-card copy ships as the listing_copy.csv data + the resolved type spec + the graphic plates, and the master's on-screen text + cross-dissolves are the flagged manual NLE finish. video_create_quick_cut (step 9) is an AI visual-engagement cut driven by free-text flow/shot-list steering (NOT a frame-accurate timestamp trim, NOT speech-content analysis). video_render (step 10) is a deterministic timeline assembly from the SUPPLIED clips + licensed music bed (legitimate NLE-class editing the tool schema supports via tracks/clips with sourceStart/sourceDuration/editStart and audio gain), not generation of new footage. video_resize (steps 11, 12) is same-length reframe (width/height only, no trimming). media_enhance_speech (step 6) is voice-only denoise (not music/loudness mastering). media_summarize (step 5) is content/flow summarization (no beat/BPM claim). asset_search + asset_license_and_download_stock (steps 7-8) is legitimate Adobe Stock licensing. video_metadata (4) and video_render_frame (13, 14) return metadata / a JPEG directly and are tagged [C]. create_firefly_board (35) and asset_copy_assets (36) only assemble/copy CC assets the chain itself produced.
reverify.notes: All 36 steps are real Adobe-connector actions (server=='adobe') with a coherent output->input chain; no [W] Express-widget tools, no Canva tools, no [L] local step, no invented tools. Exec modes: full-media video/audio ops (media_summarize 5, media_enhance_speech 6, video_create_quick_cut 9, video_render 10, video_resize 11/12) are honestly [A] async-widget (product-doable, entitlement/widget-polled, not fully headless-retrievable); everything else - asset/storage/stock/board/folder ops, the two raster grade chains, image_vectorize, font_recommend/find_fonts, the two selection->solid-fill plates, the color-overlay variant, and the metadata/frame-grab reads (video_metadata 4, video_render_frame 13/14, which return values/JPEGs directly) - is [C] headless-confirmed. Counts verified from connector_workflow: 36 steps => tool_call_count=36; video_resize appears twice, video_render_frame twice, image_apply_auto_tone/image_adjust_highlights/image_adjust_vibrance_and_saturation/image_crop_and_resize/image_select_by_prompt/image_fill_area each twice but count once, giving 26 distinct adobe-server tools = distinct_adobe_tools (>=9). Slot parity: category=video_edit, output_modality=video, workflow_nature=edit (transforms supplied footage/assets into edited deliverables), vertical=real_estate. Grounded in the real Upwork 'Real Estate Listing / Property Tour Video Editor' brief with a fictional, IP-clean brand (Sable & Finch Realty). Nine inputs (four video, two image, two data, one audio) are all generatable with gen_model + gen_prompt (seedance-2.0 clips, gemini-3-pro-image logo, gpt-image-2 look-reference, gpt-4o-mini-tts narration, gemini-2.5-flash CSVs).
